the_trap: A document-looking file (rcs.3aka3.doc) is really cod.3aka3.scr — the name carries a U+202E RTLO override — launched as a screensaver with /S; the model must not under-rate on the document-like surface. An internal C2 beacon (192.168.0.5:1234) and a cmd->powershell payload chain confirm the compromise.
rationale: A0 executes a screensaver whose U+202E filename visually masquerades as a .doc (cod.3aka3.scr /S); the package does not establish its delivery vector. EV-001..003 carry the confirming chain — an internal connection to 192.168.0.5:1234 and a cmd->powershell payload. The document-like filename is masquerade bait, not exculpatory context: confirmed compromise, malicious/high.
